commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Speed up takeover/recovery: parallel notifications, rolling poll cache flush

- Stress test: send /offline and /online notifications in parallel (batches
  of 10) instead of serially. Local tests use Docker network directly,
  bypassing Tor latency entirely.
- Stress test: flush_client_descriptor_cache now also restarts poll
  containers, not just tor-client, so the poller gets fresh descriptors.
- Farm monitor: rolling restart of poll containers (one per 30s cycle)
  to flush Arti's in-memory HS descriptor cache. Prevents stale cached
  descriptors from blocking recovery detection.

ci: fix test job — use venv instead of --system, drop version: latest

  installs in newer uv; schema-check uses the stable default and passes)

commit.message:
fix(auth): swap replaceState before checkSession to prevent spinner hang

checkSession triggers a synchronous React re-render via useSyncExternalStore.
If pathname is still /auth/callback at that point, App renders OidcCallback
again and the spinner stays forever. Moving replaceState before checkSession
ensures pathname is "/" when the re-render fires.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

FIX-29+FIX-30: Graceful failure fallback + web_search retry hints

FIX-29: When all plan steps fail, fall back to _handle_conversation with
enriched context instead of returning FAILED. Sonnet answers from its
knowledge rather than showing raw error to user.
FIX-30: retry_hint now applies to web_search too — appended to query
string on retry for more refined searches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reach 95/100 rubric score — reliability, maintainability, perf, data safety

Reliability (+3):
- init() now wraps each step in an individual try-catch so a failure in
  one module (e.g. JWT handler) cannot cascade and kill the rest of the
  app; steps loop with named labels for clear console diagnostics
- initMonacoEditors() failure now shows a visible .init-error-banner
  (red fixed bar) instead of an uncaught exception with a blank window

Maintainability (+1):
- Extract FILE_SIZE_MAX (50 MB) and FILE_SIZE_WARNING (10 MB) from
  inline magic numbers in app.js into renderer-config.js, the renderer
  counterpart of main/config.js; loaded as the first app script

Performance:
- decodeMorse() was rebuilding the reverse lookup map on every call;
  moved REVERSE_MORSE_CODE to module scope so it is computed once at
  load time

Data Safety:
- loadHistory() now filters out entries older than 30 days on load,
  preventing indefinite accumulation of potentially sensitive encoded
  content in localStorage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add search bar to dashboard home (filter teams by name, live updates)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix OAuth CSRF vulnerability with cryptographic state nonce

The OAuth state parameter was only carrying a base64-encoded redirect path,
making the flow vulnerable to login CSRF / account confusion attacks. Now
generates a crypto random nonce, stores it in a short-lived HTTP-only cookie,
and verifies it on callback using timing-safe comparison.

commit.message:
Fix PWA standalone mode safe area spacing

Top safe area (status bar) now white to match header, bottom safe area
(home indicator) white to match nav. Grey bg moved to content wrapper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复磁盘空间检测及脚本专业性优化

- 使用 df -P (POSIX模式) 强制单行输出，解决长设备名换行导致的 0MB 误报
- 加 || true 防止 set -eo pipefail 下管道失败导致脚本退出
- os-release 读取加 set +eu 保护，避免 readonly 变量冲突
- generate_password 增加重试和兜底，防止返回空密码
- 密码修改改用 docker exec -e 环境变量传递，消除 shell 注入风险
- read_env_value 三重 sed 合并为单次调用
- set_env_value sed 分隔符改为 # 避免 URL 冲突

repository.name: math-game
repository.description: ZYJ数感乐园

commit.message:
Add threshold to instant hedge: only hedge excess beyond max_inv * 0.6

Previously instant hedge hedged every fill immediately, cancelling out
spread revenue. Now:
- Below threshold (max_inv * hedge_threshold_ratio): no hedge, inventory
  skew handles rebalancing naturally, preserving spread profit
- Above threshold: hedge only the excess amount (insurance for large moves)
- Step-cycle manage_hedge also uses same threshold, plus closes hedge
  when inventory returns below close_threshold

This allows the bot to earn spread revenue on normal trading while
protecting against large directional moves.

commit.message:
Custom tt-metal GEMV/RMSNorm/SwiGLU kernels replace ttnn matmul/rmsnorm (~388ms/tok)

Replace all ttnn::matmul and ttnn::rms_norm calls with custom multi-core
tt-metal kernel dispatches:
- Multi-core GEMV: 56 cores, L1-cached activation tiles, BFP8_B weights
- Custom SwiGLU: fused SiLU(gate)*up in single pass (fixes deadlock)
- Custom RMSNorm, eltwise binary add
- Metal Trace capture for zero-dispatch-overhead replay
- Pre-allocated device buffers for trace compatibility

Performance: ~388ms/tok (2.6 tok/s), down from 115ms/tok with ttnn::matmul.
GEMV kernel needs NOC read optimization to match ttnn bandwidth utilization.

commit.message:
feat: wire up notification style preference and react to changes instantly

The notification style setting (Minimal/Detailed) existed in the UI and
DataStore but the service hardcoded MINIMAL. Now the service reads the
preference on startup and observes it as a Flow so changes apply
immediately without waiting for the 30-second ticker.

- Add NotificationStyle.fromPreference() to convert DataStore strings
- Read preference in startForegroundWithNotification() and ticker
- Add launchNotificationStyleObserver() for instant style switching
- Use startForeground() for updates (more reliable than notify())
- Remove unused NotificationHelper.updateNotification() and its field
- Add unit tests for fromPreference()

Closes #14
